name: Aurora Kinetic
description: A single hero layering a live WebGL aurora flow-field, a per-character GSAP mask-rise reveal, a magnetic call-to-action, and film-grain post — multiple techniques composed into one section.

name: Kinetic Type
description: A type-driven hero with no WebGL: GSAP line-clip reveals, a marquee band that skews with scroll momentum, characters that scramble on hover, and pointer-parallax on the headline.
